---
title: "Rāg Iman kalyaṅ"
subtitle: "*caturaṅga rasa sana*"
description: "Composition by Sadāraṅga, in Jaladtetālā (Madhyalay)"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Sadāraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jaladtetālā (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> caturaṅga rasa sana gāye ho gāyana guṇī āye  
> mahammadaśā ke ghara kāja hastī turaṅga sarasa sukha pāve  
> dāna māna sundara jara śira pāiye

**Antarā**

> sare sare gaga regagare sa papa gaga resa sare gama papa  
> dhadhapa dhadhapa ninidha ninidhadha papamama gagarega garesa

**Sanchārī**

> nāderder dāni tomderder diyānāre tom tānānatāna  
> tānānānā nāder der dāni tadāni tadāre tānānānā nānā  
> dīm tānādīm tānānānā nānānānā nānānānā nānānānā  
> dhalāṃ dhalāṃ dhalāṃ dhalāṃ

**Ābhog**

> dṛgitoma dṛgitoma dṛmikeṭe dṛmikeṭe thārikeṭe  
> thārikeṭe tākujhāku tāku jhāku nāga diga diga  
> thaṃ naṃ naṃ thuṃ diga diga toma ambo ambo amboiyā  
> tiyā iyā tiya iyā tiyā iyā tiyā iyā tiyā iyā

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jaladtetālā (drut Tintāl) is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 9, and **3** at beat 13. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | D | D | D | D | P | M | G | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **tu** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **ra** | **sa** | **sa** | **na** |
| G | $\lb{-\mathrm{R}}$ | S | R | G | - | - | - | D | D | D | D | P | M | G | P |
| **gā** | **-** | **-** | **ye** | **ho** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **tu** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **ra** | **sa** | **sa** | **na** |
| G | $\lb{-\mathrm{R}}$ | S | R | G | - | - | G | G | - | P | P | R | - | - | G |
| **gā** | **-** | **-** | **ye** | **ho** | **-** | **-** | **gā** | **ya** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **gu** |
| P | - | - | - | P | - | P | - | P | P | - | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | - |
| **ṇī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ā** | **-** | **ye** | **-** | **ma** | **ha** | **-** | **mma** | **da** | **-** | **śā** | **-** |
| P | D | P | M | G | - | D | - | P | D | P | M | G | R | G | m |
| **ke** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **gha** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **kā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| G | R | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | - | S | - | S | S | $\mn{\mathrm{D}}$ | - | S | S | S | S |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **-** | **ha** | **-** | **stī** | **-** | **tu** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **sa** |
| S | S | S | S | R | - | S | - | S | R | R | R | - | R | R | - |
| **ra** | **sa** | **su** | **kha** | **pā** | **-** | **ve** | **-** | **dā** | **-** | **na** | **mā** | **-** | **na** | **su** | **-** |
| R | G | G | G | G | R | G | m | G | R | G | m | G | R | S | S |
| **nda** | **ra** | **ja** | **ra** | **śi** | **ra** | **pā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| G | - | - | - | R | - | S | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **ye** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | S | R | S | R | G | G | R | G |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **sā** | **re** | **sā** | **re** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **gā** |
| G | R | S | - | P | P | G | G | R | S | S | R | G | M | P | P |
| **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **-** | **pā** | **pā** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **sā** | **re** | **gā** | **mā** | **pā** | **pā** |
| D | D | P | D | D | P | N | N | D | N | N | D | D | P | P | M |
| **dhā** | **dhā** | **pā** | **dhā** | **dhā** | **pā** | **ni** | **ni** | **dhā** | **ni** | **ni** | **dhā** | **dhā** | **pā** | **pā** | **mā** |
| M | G | G | R | G | G | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **mā** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | G | G | G | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **nā** | **der** | **der** | **dā** |
| P | P | P | P | P | D | D | D | D | - | P | P | P | N | D | N |
| **ni** | **tom** | **der** | **der** | **di** | **yā** | **nā** | **re** | **tom** | **-** | **tā** | **nā** | **na** | **tā** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | D | P | P | P | N | D | N | $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | D | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | P | G | G |
| **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **der** | **der** | **dā** | **ni** | **tā** | **dā** | **ni** | **ta** | **dā** | **-** | **re** |
| G | G | G | G | P | M | P | R | - | G | P | P | R | - | - | - |
| **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **-** | **nā** | **dī** | **m** | **tā** | **nā** | **-** | **dīm** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| R | G | M | P | D | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | D | P | P |
| **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** | **nā** |
| D | D | $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | M | $\lb{\mathrm{GG}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{RR}}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **dha** | **lāṃ** | **dhalāṃ** | **-** | **dha** | **lāṃ** | **dha** | **lāṃ** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | S | S | S | - | G | R | G | - | G | G | P | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **dṛ** | **gi** | **toma** | **-** | **dṛ** | **gi** | **toma** | **-** | **dṛ** | **mi** | **ke** | **ṭe** |
| P | P | P | P | P | D | D | D | D | D | P | P | P | D | D | D |
| **dṛ** | **mi** | **ke** | **ṭe** | **thā** | **ri** | **ke** | **ṭe** | **thā** | **ri** | **ke** | **ṭe** | **tā** | **ku** | **jhā** | **ku** |
| D | D | P | P | G | G | G | P | P | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | P | D | P | - |
| **tā** | **ku** | **jhā** | **ku** | **nāga** | **diga** | **diga** | **tham** | **naṃ** | **naṃ** | **thuṃ** | **-** | **diga** | **diga** | **tom** | **-** |
| P | G | G | G | R | R | S | - | S | R | G | m | G | R | S | - |
| **a** | **-** | **mvo** | **a** | **-** | **mvo** | **a** | **-** | **mvo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **yā** | **-** |
| S | R | R | R | R | R | R | R | R | G | - | G | G | - | G | - |
| **ti** | **yā** | **i** | **yā** | **ti** | **yā** | **i** | **yā** | **ti** | **yā** | **-** | **i** | **yā** | **-** | **ti** | **-** |
| G | - | P | P | R | - | - | R | R | G | M | P | D | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ |
| **yā** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **ti** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | P | P | G | R | S | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
